post.summary:
Register a new user.
Creates a new user account, triggers the verification email,
and returns a Sanctum access token

Login user.
Authenticates the user and returns a Sanctum access token

Request password reset link.
Sends an email containing a secure link to reset the user's password

Reset password.
Updates the user's password using the token provided via email

get.summary:
Redirect the user to the provider's authentication page.
Returns the URL for the frontend to handle the redirect to avoid CORS issues

Obtain the user information from the provider.
Handles the callback, issues a Sanctum token, and redirects to the SPA with `#access_token=...`

post.summary:
Logout user.
Revokes the current Sanctum access token

get.summary:
Get current user.
Retrieves the profile information for the currently authenticated user

post.summary:
Resend verification email.
Triggers a new email verification link to be sent to the authenticated user

get.summary:
Verify email address.
Validates the signed URL and marks the user's email as verified

List tenant domains.
Retrieves all domains attached to a specific tenant

post.summary:
Add a custom domain.
Attaches a new custom domain to the tenant if their plan permits it

delete.summary:
Remove a domain.
Deletes a specific domain from the tenant

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.summary: Get details of a specific invoice

List all plans.
* Retrieves all available subscription plans ordered by price

post.summary:
Create a new plan.
* Adds a new subscription tier to the platform

get.summary:
Get plan details.
* Retrieves a specific subscription plan

put.summary:
Update a plan.
* Modifies the features or pricing of an existing plan

delete.summary:
Delete a plan.
* Removes a subscription plan from the platform

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

post.summary: Issue an invoice for the subscription

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

delete.summary:
Delete tenant.
* Removes the tenant and their associated domains

email.description: The email address to send the password reset link to.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

token.description: The reset token received via email.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

email_verified_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the email was verified.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the account was created.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
